meta.title: Mustafa Aksu — Software Engineer
meta.description: Software Engineer building elegant, performant web experiences. Open to opportunities across the EU and remote.

home.headline: I build software that feels effortless.
home.subhead: Software engineer focused on clean architecture, fast interfaces, and the small details that make products feel right.

about.title: About
about.lead: I'm a software engineer who cares about craftsmanship.
body: I build web applications end-to-end, from data modeling to the pixel that makes the button feel right when you press it. My day-to-day is mostly TypeScript, React, and Node, with a healthy respect for the database underneath.
Outside of code, I read, lift, and travel. I'm currently based in Türkiye and open to roles across the EU, the DACH region, or remote.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lead: A selection of things I've built. Each one taught me something different.

skills.title: Skills
skills.lead: Tools I reach for, organized by where they sit in the stack.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.lead: The fastest way is email. I read everything and reply within a day or two.
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Thanks — I'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Try emailing me directly?

footer.tagline: Built from scratch with Next.js and a lot of coffee.
